name: libdatetime-format-strptime-perl
title: libdatetime-format-strptime-perl
summary: Perl module to parse and format strp and strf time patterns
description:
Perl module to parse and format strp and strf time patterns
DateTime::Format::Strptime implements most of strptime(3), the POSIX
function that is the reverse of strftime(3), for DateTime. While strftime
takes a DateTime and a pattern and returns a string, strptime takes
a string and a pattern and returns the DateTime object
associated.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdatetime-format-strptime-perl because Perl module to parse and format strp and strf time patterns.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdatetime-format-strptime-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdatetime-format-strptime-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdatetime-format-strptime-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
